understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile '+' on each level while avoiding spikes, using limited turns per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT triggers automatic gravity fall until landing; CLICK removes breakable 'x' tiles; spikes end run immediately; UNDO reverts last action; oscillating without progressing to passages depletes turns and fails attempts.
